::: notes
In order to interpret logistic regression models 
and find their MLEs,
we will need to compute various derivatives.
This section compiles some useful results.
:::

### Derivatives of odds function

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_thms-deriv-odds.qmd >}}

### Derivatives of inverse-odds function

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_sec_invodds_derivs.qmd >}}

### Derivatives of logit function

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_sec_derivs_logit.qmd >}}

### Derivatives of expit function

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_sec_derivs_expit.qmd >}}

### Summary matrix of derivatives

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_tbl-logistic-deriv-matrix.qmd >}}
